sched_begin.tooltip: Initialize the curriculum module and bind the TFT screen

sched_load.tooltip: Read curriculum data from Flash (class/summer vacation/winter vacation mode)

sched_show.tooltip: Draw the course schedule interface on the screen

sched_set_defaults.message0: Course Schedule Set Default Course Monday %1 Tuesday %2 Wednesday %3 Thursday %4 Friday %5 Saturday %6 Sunday %7
sched_set_defaults.tooltip: Set the default course schedule, 8 lessons per day, separated by commas. Called before load

sched_start_server.message0: Course Schedule Start Web Service Port %1
sched_start_server.tooltip: Start the WiFi web server for mobile phone/computer browser to configure course schedule

sched_handle_client.tooltip: Process the HTTP request from the browser and call it in the loop

sched_day_prev.tooltip: Switch to the previous day's course

sched_set_weekday.tooltip: Set the current day of the week (0=Monday, 6=Sunday), used to mark the current course

sched_is_dirty.message0: Course schedule needs to be refreshed
sched_is_dirty.tooltip: Returns whether the screen needs to be refreshed (true after mode change after Web configuration or saving)

sched_clear_dirty.tooltip: Clear the refresh mark and use it with is_dirty

sched_get_mode.tooltip: Return to the current mode (0=class, 1=summer vacation, 2=winter vacation)

sched_set_mode.tooltip: Manually set the course schedule mode (class/summer vacation/winter vacation)
